name: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue with Freddy & Juan
original_name: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue with Freddy & Juan
overview: With nearly 40 years of mining under his belt, Freddy Dodge goes on the road to help struggling mine owners to hit the mother lode; he teams up with Juan Ibarra to overhaul washplants, introduce gold recovery techniques and transform operations.

trailers.title: Gold Rush: Freddy Dodge's Mine Rescue | Now Streaming on discovery+
